title: The Lord Reigns, Let the Earth Be Glad!

verses.text: Fire goes before him and consumes his enemies on very side. His lightning flashes light the world, And all the earth is terrified.
All those who worship images are Put to everlasting shame; Their worthless idols are their boast – You gods, bow down before his name!
Your judgments gladden Zion’s hills, Bring Judah’s daughters great delight. Above the earth and all the god, Exalted is the Lord Most High.
Upon the righteous light will shine, And joy for those of upright heart. You righteous in the Lord, rejoice, And praise unto his name impart.
